Package com.mycompany.njt_mavenproject.entity.impl

Class Mehanicar

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.njt_mavenproject.entity.impl.Mehanicar
All Implemented Interfaces:
MyEntity
@Entity public class Mehanicar extends Object implements MyEntity
Entitet koji predstavlja mehaničara zaposlenog u servisu za vozila.
Author:
Bojana
